title: Detour: output detail
summary: This optional slide clarifies why 2D navigation should not automatically bloat every static output.

cards.title: Core output
cards.body: A reader who opens a PDF should see the intended short path first.

cards.title: Full path later
cards.body: A future export option can include detours after their parent core slide.

cards.title: Validation
cards.body: Navigation validation catches missing parents, duplicate detours, and hidden parent slides.
